pr.title: Capture first lane-1 evidence summary; add emit_evidence_summary to the Windows revalidation gate (8→9 points)
pr.description:
## Summary

Two follow-ups to the just-merged #58 (`emit_evidence_summary`), no code changes:

1. **First captured proof object.** Ran the full loop on Ubuntu (lane 1) against merged main (`e923933`): `code-inventory --refresh` → `execution-chain-run` → `capability-evidence-apply` → `emit_evidence_summary` via the Local Runner. Commits the resulting tracked summary at `artifacts/validation_runs/0e268ee148ff4477b65c62c614fe7a90/evidence_summary.{json,md}`: chain id-flow `PASS`, `quality_verdict=SUBSTANTIVE` (module_count=167, import_edge_count=359), `decision=accepted`, confidence `very_high`/`ready` (before→after both `very_high` — this box's capability state was already promoted by prior lane-1 runs, so no jump; honest current state). This is the repo's first *captured* (committed) loop proof and a concrete example of what a lane-2 run should produce.

2. **Runbook: 8-point → 9-point lane-2 gate.** `docs/runbooks/windows-post-151-revalidation-runbook.md` gains step 5, `emit_evidence_summary` (in-process, read-only, no WDAC exe-shim exposure), renumbers the later steps, adds `tests/test_evidence_summary.py` to the targeted test set, and updates "Recording the result": the committed summary is now the primary captured proof, with the gitignored chain/intake/confidence dirs kept locally as the source bundle referenced by relative path.

## What behavior changed
None (docs + committed evidence artifact only).

## What did NOT change
No runtime code, semantics, tests, or CI.

## Tests run
None — docs/artifact-only change (tiered testing policy). The committed summary itself was produced by the runner on merged main.

## Validation still pending
Windows lane-2 re-run by operator using the updated 9-point gate.

## Factory relevance
Evidence-artifact improvement: seeds the Phase-2 navigable graph with the first tracked proof object and makes the lane-2 procedure end attested→captured.


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
pr.author: plamen-dev

commits.author: plamen.hristov@imsdevlab.onmicrosoft.com
commits.message:
Capture first lane-1 evidence summary; add emit_evidence_summary to Windows revalidation gate

- Commit the first tracked evidence_summary (Ubuntu lane-1 loop on merged main
  e923933: chain PASS, quality SUBSTANTIVE, decision accepted) as the repo's
  first captured proof object.
- Extend the Windows post-#151 revalidation runbook from an 8-point to a
  9-point gate: new step 5 runs emit_evidence_summary and commits the summary,
  turning lane-2 evidence from attested to captured.

Co-Authored-By: Devin AI <158243242+devin-ai-integration[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
